arts.ttl: Paul Pogba has already given Man United transfer return verdict amid invitation message
arts.sum: Paul Pogba has previously had his say on a return to Manchester United after returning to Old Trafford in 2016

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'contacted' by Thomas Tuchel as Man United attacker receives firm England answer
arts.sum: England boss Thomas Tuchel reportedly informs Marcus Rashford whether he sees him as part of his Three Lions plans moving forward.

arts.ttl: David de Gea and Erik ten Hag point made as Andre Onana sent Man United 'mistakes' message
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Thomas Fair, Manchester Evening News readers)
arts.sum: The Manchester United goalkeeper continues to be under scrutiny as Ruben Amorim's side toil in the bottom half of the table.

arts.ttl: Amorim keen to reunite with €60m Sporting star Quenda at Man Utd
arts.sum: Born in Guinea-Bissau before moving to Portugal as a child, Quenda broke into the Sporting first team earlier this season with Amorim deploying the teenager at right wing-back. Ruben Amorim is keen to bring Geovany Quenda to Manchester United, The Transfers Podcast understands.

arts.ttl: Man United delivered brutal transfer ultimatum to Patrick Dorgu, Lecce president reveals
arts.sum: Manchester United issued a transfer ultimatum to Lecce and Patrick Dorgu in order to seal the £29.5m signing of the Dane in January, the Italian club's president reveals.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney lined up for big TV job as four giants battle to land Man Utd icon
arts.sum: Amazon has had discussions about former England captain Wayne Rooney becoming a regular member of their list of big names - but Sky Sports, Match of the Day and TNT Sports are also fans

arts.ttl: 'The top three': Leny Yoro says Arsenal duo and Liverpool star are the best players in the world in their position
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Leny Yoro has singled out two Arsenal players and a Liverpool ace as the “top three” players in the world in their...

arts.ttl: Manchester United maintain brilliant run as Chloe Kelly saga solved with Man City decision
arts.sum: Man United and Manchester City have experienced contrasting emotions in the past week, both on and off the pitch.

arts.ttl: Hojlund facing Man Utd AXE with Premier League rivals circling
arts.sum: Hojlund has netted just two Premier League goals in 19 appearances this season and Amorim is understood to be unconvinced that the 22-year-old is capable of being his leading striker. Ferguson’s loan does not include a buy option and, should the 20-year-old prove his form with the Hammers, they would likely face a battle to sign him permanently, leading to interest in Hojlund as an alternative.

arts.ttl: The 14 wonderkids who can make Man United's 'Mission 21' a reality: Our expert picks the best future stars that Sir Jim Ratcliffe should sign to win the Premier League in the next three years ...and the new arrival who shows the project is already underway
arts.sum: Manchester United have launched an ambitious blueprint to win their 21st top-flight title within the next three years and stay clear of Liverpool in the record books.
